$comment: D-CSUBSET-GENERIC-RESULT-TYPE-DEDUCTION (C23 6.5.1.1p3): a _Generic selection's TYPE is the SELECTED association's, not the controlling expression's. sizeof(_Generic((long-x), long:(char)1, ...)) is 1 (the selected char) on every data model; the pre-fix code typed the selection from the controlling long (8 on LP64, 4 on LLP64), which would exit 56 / 48. Exercises both the Pass-1.5 array-dimension sizeof fold and an `auto` binding + sizeof(auto). argc-seeded; exit = 42 on every 64-bit target incl. the shipped release pipeline. RED-on-revert: revert the subtreeType `_Generic` case and the selection types from the controlling long.
